posture: 1-2y strategic centerpiece: the household is already diversified across 8 asset classes per the user directive — the work is NVDA-cap reduction at the user-confirmed 3,000 sh/yr cadence (NOT the legacy plan's 10,000 sh/yr), UCITS estate-tax optimization (Irish-domiciled CSPX/ACWD/FWRA/CNDX), and 5-year salary+RSU+ESPP accumulation toward the 22M NIS / age-49 target with continued working margin through 49. Section 102 24-month lockup is lot-aware: 2024-and-earlier grants (213000, 246477) qualify for 25%+3% surtax capital track in 2026; later grants (289172, 289173, 331375, 374434) defer until each grant's 24-month anniversary. Surtax applies in full (28% effective) on every CGT NIS because 2026 base+ESPP runrate (828k NIS) already clears the ~721k threshold before any RSU vest. Patient UCITS deployment continues over urgent rebalancing into RSI-stretched US ETFs. Substrate repair (failed sentiment analyst, tax-lot ingest, attorney retainer, cap-enforcement) precedes new offensive tranches.

targets.label: NVDA RSU deconcentration cadence (annual share count)
targets.rationale: User-confirmed 3,000 sh/yr cadence; ConcentrationAnalyst shows 1,600 sold YTD vs 1,258 target = +342 ahead. Legacy plan's 10,000 sh/yr 2026 schedule rejected: it pushes ordinary-income slice well into 47% bracket and locks 28% effective on all CGT NIS.

targets.label: NVDA share-count at year-end 2026 (3,000/yr cadence)
targets.rationale: Glide-path: 11,471 (snapshot) − 3,000 = 8,471 at end-2026; → ~5,471 end-2027 → ~2,471 end-2028; reaches 15% strategic by 2031 at constant NVDA price.

targets.label: Restated household savings capacity (post-tax NIS/yr)
targets.rationale: Restated to include Noga's income + corrected $449k RSU pipeline (legacy plan modeled $100k, a ~4.5x understatement per PlanCritique RED). User directive confirms ~360k NIS/yr bank-side; brokerage-side RSU accumulation (~$315k net/yr) is the second flow.

targets.label: Bank-side household savings (separated flow)
targets.rationale: Per user directive: (44k bank-net + 9k ESPP − 23k expenses) × 12 = 360k NIS/yr. Separates bank-side savings from brokerage-side RSU accumulation per PlanCritique RED on savings reconciliation.

targets.label: FIRE-bridge funding gap (49→60 liquid drawdown requirement)
targets.rationale: 11 years × 277k NIS canonical spend = ~3,047k NIS required from liquid portfolio before age-60 partial unlocks. Current 720k 24-month buffer covers only ~24% of need. Keren hishtalmut 384k withdrawable now (post-6-year vesting); Noga's balance unquantified.

targets.label: Cap-enforcement substrate go-live date (days to go)
targets.rationale: Hard milestone 2026-07-15 for sector cap + US-situs cap + estate trip-wire enforcement substrate. Without enforcement substrate, caps are advisory.

targets.label: Redeployment fill discipline — avoid stretched US ETFs at 52w highs
targets.rationale: 0% incremental allocation target while broad US ETFs (SCHD, VTV, VOO, QQQM, SCHG, SPMO) are RSI > 65 at 52w highs. Operationalizes patient-UCITS theme.

targets.label: NVDA shares qualifying for Section 102 capital track in 2026 (lot-aware)
targets.rationale: Pre-2024 grants (213000, 246477) cleanly qualify for 25%+3% surtax capital track in 2026; later grants (289172/289173 mid-2024, 331375 2025-03, 374434 2026-03) defer until each 24-month grant anniversary. Approximate 2026-eligible capacity ~2,000 sh, with the 3,000 sh annual target consuming carry into 2027 from later grants as they mature.

themes.label: Already-diversified posture — medium work is NVDA-cap reduction + UCITS migration + accumulation, not de-risking
themes.rationale: User directive Wave 8 v2.3 corrects the framing: snapshot supports 8-asset-class diversification with NVDA at ~18% strategic. The medium plan executes targeted reduction of an over-weighted single name and migration of US-situs exposure to UCITS, not a structural transition out of concentration.

themes.label: Section 102 24-month clock is binding and lot-aware
themes.rationale: Selling within 24 months of grant re-classifies the gain as ordinary salary income (47%+ marginal). Award 374434 (grant 2026-03-09) — 24-month threshold March 2028; Award 331375 (grant 2025-03-10) — March 2027; Awards 289172/289173 (mid-2024) — mid-2026 onward. Lot-tagging required before each tranche.

themes.label: Surtax applies in full (28% effective CGT) — not 'potential' 25%
themes.rationale: 2026 base+ESPP runrate 828k NIS already exceeds the ~721k surtax threshold before any RSU vest or NVDA sale. Every marginal CGT NIS is at 28% (25% CGT + 3% surtax). PlanCritique YELLOW.

themes.label: FIRE-bridge 49→60→67 is materially underfunded at 24%
themes.rationale: 11 years × 277k = ~3,047k NIS bridge requirement; current 720k 24-month buffer covers only ~24%. Sequencing required: keren hishtalmut (384k tax-free post-6yr) → age-60 unlocks (executive insurance ~756k, kupat gemel, Tikun 190 eligibility) → age-67 kupat pensia annuity. Noga's keren hishtalmut balance unquantified — material gap.

themes.label: Patient UCITS deployment, not urgent rebalancing
themes.rationale: Broad US ETFs stretched at 52w highs with overbought RSIs; CSPX/ACWD/FWRA are durable vehicles for incremental US-equity exposure with no US-situs estate exposure. No urgency to chase.

themes.label: NVDA RSU treated as external income stream, not managed-portfolio inventory
themes.rationale: Sector-cap denominator excludes NVDA RSU lots; deconcentration is a glidepath, not a forced rebalance. Preserves Section 102 capital-track treatment.

themes.label: Commerce export-loophole closure is a live NVDA-specific catalyst
themes.rationale: US Commerce closed the Rubin/Blackwell-to-Chinese-subsidiaries-abroad loophole (NewsAnalyst materiality 0.55, HIGH confidence). Durable TAM compression but does NOT auto-accelerate cadence — 3,000 sh/yr holds.

themes.label: FX tailwind for NIS-savers buying USD-priced UCITS
themes.rationale: USD/NIS at 2.813, USD weakening 4.73% over 30d and 8.56% over 90d. NIS-side buyers get more USD per shekel on UCITS purchases.

themes.label: Broad-market multiple-compression risk on 4.5% real-return assumption
themes.rationale: Accepted prior-round delta preserved. Macro regime=neutral (10Y 4.45%, WTI $97.63 stagflation drag), fleet multiples stretched outside NVDA (TSLA PE 424 / PEG 31 on -39% earnings growth, AMD PEG 3.07, AMZN EV/EBITDA 115). Threatens the plan's 4.5% real-return baseline.

themes.label: Substrate repair precedes new tranches
themes.rationale: Sentiment analyst failed citation discipline this cycle; technical analyst FAILED; tax-lot ingest pending; W-8BEN expiry not tracked. Repair before deploy — Ariel's accuracy-over-cost preference applied.

actions.label: Execute remaining ~1,400-share NVDA deconcentration to hit 3,000 sh 2026 target; sequence lot-aware, tax-year-spaced
actions.trigger_or_date: if(lot_grant_date <= 2024-06-02 AND share lot's 24-month Section 102 clock cleared)
actions.detail: Sell from pre-mid-2024 grants only (213000, 246477) to qualify for 25%+3% surtax capital track in 2026; carry deferred shares from later grants (289172, 289173, 331375, 374434) into 2027+ as each grant's 24-month anniversary passes.
actions.rationale: PlanCritique YELLOW: legacy 10,000 sh/yr 2026 schedule mixes ineligible grants and forces ordinary-rate reclassification. 3,000 sh/yr cadence with lot-aware grant-date eligibility maximizes net proceeds.

actions.label: Migrate residual US-domiciled non-NVDA holdings to UCITS over 24 months
actions.detail: Phase SCHD, SCHG, VOO, QQQM, SPMO, VTV, SGOV out of taxable Schwab/Leumi accounts into CSPX/ACWD/FWRA/CNDX (Irish-domiciled). Pace sized to drive US-situs tail toward $1.37M target inside the 24-month NVDA-deconcentration window.
actions.rationale: PlanCritique GREEN on UCITS routing correctness; YELLOW on understated current $976k vs $1.21M-$1.37M actual tail.

actions.label: Wire cap-enforcement substrate (sector + US-situs + estate trip-wire)
actions.detail: Encode 35% info-tech sector cap (managed-portfolio denominator excluding NVDA RSU), $1.5M US-situs new-position ceiling, and $60k NRA-exemption estate trip-wire into proposal-generation pipeline.
actions.rationale: Without enforcement substrate, caps drift unmonitored. PlanCritique YELLOW on sector exposure, RED on estate gap force this to be hard-dated.

actions.label: Add explicit FIRE-bridge analysis table (49→60→67)
actions.detail: Model annual 277k NIS drawdown ages 49-60 from liquid portfolio (~3,047k cumulative); sequence keren hishtalmut tax-free withdrawals (384k Ariel + Noga TBD); age-60 partial unlocks (executive insurance ~756k, kupat gemel, Tikun 190 eligibility); age-67 full kupat pensia annuity activation.
actions.rationale: Accepted prior-round delta preserved. Closes PlanCritique YELLOW on 24% bridge coverage. Quantifies Noga's keren hishtalmut as a critical data gap.

actions.label: Cross-border attorney retainer (IL/RO/US) — hard deadline
actions.detail: Retain cross-border estate-planning attorney by 2026-06-10; auto-defer next quarterly NVDA tranche if retainer not engaged.
actions.rationale: will_exists=false, 2 minor children, assets across 3 jurisdictions, US-situs tail ~$1.21M-$1.37M. PlanCritique RED: 706-NA filing burden lands on heirs with no executor.

actions.label: Dispatch domain-refresh: Israeli tax substrate
actions.detail: Re-validate Section 102, 3(i), Bituach Leumi monthly ceiling, surtax threshold, 2026 bracket boundaries against current ITA / BTL publications. All current domain files carry last_verified=1900-01-01.
actions.rationale: TaxAnalyst self-flagged LOW confidence due to stale domain files; bracket-boundary drift already evidenced (plan 81,480 vs domain 84,120).

actions.label: Dispatch domain-refresh: US NRA estate-tax substrate
actions.detail: Re-validate $60k NRA exemption, 40% top rate, Form 706-NA filing window, US-situs scope (NVDA + US ETFs + Atlanta SFR) against current IRS publications.
actions.rationale: Estate gap elevated to top-three structural risk; substrate must be primary-source-validated before user-facing legal action.

actions.label: Re-run failed analysts with citation discipline (sentiment, technical)
actions.trigger_or_date: if(SentimentAnalystAgent or TechnicalAnalystAgent not repaired by 2026-06-15)
actions.detail: If failed-citation analysts have not been re-run with mandatory cited_sources populated by 2026-06-15, all equity-allocation gates auto-suspend until repair.
actions.rationale: This cycle's SentimentAnalyst emitted empty citations; TechnicalAnalyst FAILED; ConcentrationAnalyst missing plan_targets. Decisions cannot be made on broken substrate.

actions.label: Encode multi-year NVDA glide-path into plan_targets
actions.detail: Encode the NVDA share-count glide (end-2026 8,471 sh → end-2027 5,471 sh → end-2028 2,471 sh → 15% strategic by 2031) into plan_targets so ConcentrationAnalyst has a target to score against.
actions.rationale: ConcentrationAnalyst self-flagged 'No plan_targets supplied, so no per-category deltas or formal breaches computed'.

actions.label: Redeployment routing rule — avoid US large-cap growth wrappers on NVDA-sale proceeds
actions.detail: Do not route NVDA-sale or RSU-vest proceeds into SCHD/VTV/VOO/QQQM/SCHG/SPMO this cycle. Route to SGOV (parking) or UCITS top-up (CSPX/ACWD/FWRA) instead.
actions.rationale: Broad US ETFs stretched; SCHD/VTV at exit signals; VOO/QQQM/SCHG hold-don't-add.

actions.label: Restate balance sheet (FX, NVDA share count, Scenic Parkway, pension memo)
actions.detail: Add pension memo line (keren hishtalmut ~384k NIS + executive insurance ~756k NIS + pension fund ~800k NIS); write off Scenic Parkway ($100k impaired, $0 net equity); refresh FX baseline to 2.813 (BoI spot) from plan's 3.09; reflect NVDA share count 11,471 (not 12,748); separate bank-side 360k NIS/yr savings from brokerage-side $315k net/yr RSU accumulation.
actions.rationale: PlanCritique RED on FX staleness, RED on NVDA snapshot staleness, RED on savings reconciliation, YELLOW on Scenic Parkway undisclosed.

actions.label: Quantify Noga's keren hishtalmut balance
actions.detail: Surface Noga's keren hishtalmut balance into household_budget / pension memo line; critical input to FIRE-bridge tax-free pre-60 withdrawal sequencing.
actions.rationale: PlanCritique YELLOW: Noga's balance unknown is material gap for bridge sequencing; keren hishtalmut is the only material tax-free pre-60 withdrawal vehicle.

rationale: Medium horizon is the strategic centerpiece. The bear-won debate reinforces — not displaces — the substrate already laid down: 3,000 sh/yr NVDA cadence, UCITS-first deployment, NVDA RSU carved out of sector denominator, cap-enforcement substrate by 2026-07-15. The minor revisions this cycle: (a) retract the incorrect 'transition from concentrated single stock' framing — user directive Wave 8 v2.3 confirms portfolio is already 8-asset-class diversified; (b) add explicit Section 102 lot-aware constraint (pre-2024 grants only qualify in 2026; later grants defer to each 24-month anniversary); (c) add explicit surtax-in-full theme (28% on every CGT NIS, not 25% 'potential'); (d) add explicit FIRE-bridge underfunding theme (24% coverage, ~3.047M NIS gap); (e) separate bank-side 360k NIS/yr savings from brokerage-side $315k net/yr RSU accumulation per PlanCritique RED; (f) add target for Noga's keren hishtalmut balance quantification. The bull's strongest argument (front-load USD purchases on FX tailwind) is fully addressed by the patient-UCITS theme. The bear's strongest argument (don't chase RSI > 65 ETFs at 52w highs) is operationalized by the redeployment routing rule. Confidence MEDIUM: data is LIVE but tax-substrate domain files carry last_verified=1900-01-01 pending domain-refresh; sentiment and technical analyst outputs failed citation discipline this cycle.
